utility_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} (M : CombinatorialAuction Bidder Item) (values reports : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item) (i : Bidder), utility M values reports i = values i (allocation reports i) - payment reports i

truthfulOn_iff.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] (M : CombinatorialAuction Bidder Item) (admissible : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to Prop), truthfulOn M admissible \iff \forall (values : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item), admissible values \to \forall (i : Bidder) (report : Bundle Item \to ℝ), utility M values (update values i report) i \le utility M values values i

generalizedVickreyAuction_allocation_pay.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] (alloc : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to BundleAllocation Bidder Item) (reports : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item) (i : Bidder), (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).allocation reports = alloc reports \land (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).payment reports i = allocationValueExcept reports (alloc (reportsWithoutBidder reports i)) i - allocationValueExcept reports (alloc reports) i

singleMindedAcceptedMechanism_fields.statement: \forall (Bidder : Type u_1) (Item : Type u_2) (M : singleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), M = M

singleMindedTruthfulOn_iff.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item) (admissible : (Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Prop), singleMindedTruthfulOn M admissible \iff \forall (values : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), admissible values \to \forall (i : Bidder) (report : SingleMindedBid Item), admissible (update values i report) \to utility values (update values i report) i \le utility values values i

nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile_i.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Item] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile bids \iff \forall (i : Bidder), Nonempty (bids i).desired \land 0 \le (bids i).value

weightedSetPackingValue_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (selected : Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingValue weights selected = \sum i \in selected, weights i

setPackingSingleMindedBids_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} (sets : Bidder \to Finset Item) (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (i : Bidder), setPackingSingleMindedBids sets weights i = { desired := sets i, value := weights i }

averageAmountPerGood_formula.statement: \forall {Item : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Item] (b : SingleMindedBid Item), averageAmountPerGood b = value / bundleSize

averageOrderOf_rule.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_2 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), (averageOrderOf bids).Nodup \land (\forall (i : Bidder), i \in averageOrderOf bids) \land SingleMindedAverageAmountDescending bids (averageOrderOf bids)

greedyAcceptedFromOrder_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (order : List Bidder), greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order = foldl (singleMindedGreedyStep bids) \varnothing order

averageGreedyAcceptedSet_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), averageGreedyAcceptedSet bids = greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids (averageOrderOf bids)

averageGreedyPayment_formula.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (j : Bidder), averageGreedyPayment bids j = if j \in averageGreedyAcceptedSet bids then match paper_greedy_next_denied_from_order bids (averageOrderOf bids) j with | none  =>  0 | some n  =>  (bids j).bundleSize * (bids n).averageAmountPerGood else 0

theorem4_1_generalized_vickrey_truthful.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] (alloc : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to BundleAllocation Bidder Item), gvaWelfareMaximizingAllocationRule alloc \to (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).TruthfulDominantStrategy

proposition4_2_generalized_vickrey_truth.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] (alloc : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to BundleAllocation Bidder Item), gvaWelfareMaximizingAllocationRule alloc \to \forall (values : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item), nonnegativeValues values \to \forall (i : Bidder), 0 \le (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).utility values values i

theorem6_1_set_packing_feasibility_encod.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (sets : Bidder \to Finset Item) (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (selected : Finset Bidder), PairwiseDisjointDesired (setPackingSingleMindedBids sets weights) selected \iff setPackingFeasible sets selected

theorem6_1_set_packing_value_encoding_co.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] (sets : Bidder \to Finset Item) (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (selected : Finset Bidder), paper_single_minded_total_value (setPackingSingleMindedBids sets weights) selected = weightedSetPackingValue weights selected

theorem6_1_weighted_set_packing_reductio.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (sets : Bidder \to Finset Item) (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (selected : Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingOptimal sets weights selected \iff singleMindedOptimalAcceptedSet (setPackingSingleMindedBids sets weights) selected

theorem6_1_clique_decision_single_minded.statement: \forall {Vertex : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Vertex] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Vertex] (problem : graphCliqueDecisionInstance Vertex), graphCliqueDecisionProblem problem \iff singleMindedWelfareDecisionProblem (graphCliqueDecisionToSingleMindedWelfareDecision problem)

theorem6_1_external_optimal_solver_np_eq.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} {Language : Type u_3} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (complexityModel : ComplexityClassModel Language) (FeasibleSM : ((Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (FeasibleWSP : ((Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (solver : (Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder), singleMindedOptimalSolver solver \to FeasibleSM solver \to (FeasibleSM solver \to FeasibleWSP (setPackingSolverOfSingleMindedSolver solver)) \to (\forall (wspSolver : (Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingOptimalSolver wspSolver \to FeasibleWSP wspSolver \to npEqZPP) \to npEqZPP

theorem6_1_external_approximation_solver.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} {Language : Type u_3} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (factor : ℝ) (complexityModel : ComplexityClassModel Language) (FeasibleSM : ((Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (FeasibleWSP : ((Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (solver : (Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder), singleMindedApproximationSolverAtLeast factor solver \to FeasibleSM solver \to (FeasibleSM solver \to FeasibleWSP (setPackingSolverOfSingleMindedSolver solver)) \to (\forall (wspSolver : (Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingApproximationSolverAtLeast factor wspSolver \to FeasibleWSP wspSolver \to npEqZPP) \to npEqZPP

complexity_note_np_eq_zpp_implies_random.statement: \forall {Language : Type u_1} (complexityModel : randomizedComplexityClassModel Language), npEqZPP \to NP = RP \land NP = coRP \land NP = coNP

theorem7_2_sqrt_norm_approx_of_sorted_or.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] [Inhabited Bidder] [Inhabited Item] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (optimal : Finset Bidder) (goods : Finset Item) (order : List Bidder), (\forall i \in optimal, (bids i).desired \subseteq goods) \to PairwiseDisjointDesired bids optimal \to (\forall i \in optimal, Nonempty (bids i).desired) \to (\forall i \in greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order, Nonempty (bids i).desired) \to (\forall i \in optimal, 0 \le (bids i).value) \to (\forall i \in greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order, 0 \le (bids i).value) \to SingleMindedSqrtNormDescending bids order \to (\forall i \in optimal, i \in order) \to singleMindedTotalValue bids optimal \le √↑card * singleMindedTotalValue bids (greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order)

lemma9_1_exists_nonnegative_critical_val.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), MonotonicityOn nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile \to \forall (reports : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile reports \to \forall (i : Bidder) (s : Finset Item), Nonempty \to (\exists c, 0 \le c \land (\forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to v < c \to i ∉ accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })) \land \forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to c < v \to i \in accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })) \lor \forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to i ∉ accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })

lemma9_2_denied_bidder_utility_eq_zero.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), Participation \to \forall (values reports : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile values \to \forall {i : Bidder}, i ∉ accepted reports \to utility values reports i = 0

lemma9_3_truthful_utility_nonnegative_of.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), Participation \to \forall (C : NonnegativeCriticalValueWithInfinityCertificate) (values : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile values \to \forall (i : Bidder), 0 \le utility values values i

lemma9_4_no_profitable_value_only_lie_of.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), MonotonicityOn nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile \to Participation \to \forall (C : NonnegativeCriticalValueWithInfinityCertificate) (values : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile values \to \forall (i : Bidder) {v' : ℝ}, 0 \le v' \to utility values (update values i { desired := (values i).desired, value := v' }) i \le utility values values i

lemma9_5_finite_threshold_mono_of_nonneg.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), MonotonicityOn nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile \to \forall (C : NonnegativeCriticalValueWithInfinityCertificate) (reports : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile reports \to \forall (i : Bidder) {sSmall sLarge : Finset Item} {pLarge : ℝ}, Nonempty \to Nonempty \to sSmall \subseteq sLarge \to threshold reports i sLarge = some pLarge \to \exists pSmall, threshold reports i sSmall = some pSmall \land pSmall \le pLarge

theorem9_6_single_minded_truthful_of_non.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), MonotonicityOn nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile \to Participation \to \forall (C : NonnegativeCriticalValueWithInfinityCertificate), singleMindedTruthfulOn M nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile

theorem10_2_averageGreedy_truthful.statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_2 : LinearOrder Bidder], singleMindedTruthfulOn averageGreedyAcceptedMechanism nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile
